div.p: Preventing SIGCHLD race conditions during job table modification
Main: job->next = new_job [SIGCHLD arrives] Handler: reads job_list Main: job_list = new_job → CORRUPTION!
Main: block SIGCHLD Main: job->next = new_job Main: job_list = new_job Main: unblock SIGCHLD [SIGCHLD now delivered] Handler: reads consistent list → SAFE!
